name: Casa Holdings Limited
summary: Casa Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, distributes home and cooking appliances, kitchen and bathroom fixtures, and accessories in Southeast Asia, South Asia, North Africa, the Middle East, and internationally. It operates through two segments, Trading and Property Development. The company offers hobs, cooker hoods, ovens, microwave ovens, washers, dryers, dishwashers, washing machines, tumble dryers, and fridges under the EF and ELBA brand names; washing machine under the Beko brand; wine coolers under the CHATEAU brand; kitchen sinks, faucets, mirror cabinets, showers, and bathroom accessories under the Rubine brand; bath tubs and shower trays under the BLB brand; and water heaters under the Ferroli brand. It also develops and constructs residential and commercial properties. Casa Holdings Limited was founded in 1976 and is based in Singapore.
